context: Tests whether the agent applies caveman compression rules correctly: dropping articles, filler words, and pleasantries; using abbreviations for common terms; using arrows for causality; writing in the caveman pattern; while keeping technical substance intact.

checklist.name: No opening pleasantries
checklist.description: explanations.md does NOT start with or contain pleasantries such as 'Sure', 'Certainly', 'Of course', 'Happy to', 'Great question'

checklist.name: No filler words
checklist.description: explanations.md does NOT contain filler words: 'basically', 'essentially', 'simply', 'really', 'actually', 'just' used as filler

checklist.name: Abbreviations used
checklist.description: explanations.md uses at least TWO abbreviations from: DB, auth, config, req, res, fn, impl, conn (instead of spelling out the full words)

checklist.name: Arrows for causality
checklist.description: explanations.md uses the arrow notation (X -> Y or X → Y) at least once to express a cause-and-effect or sequence relationship

checklist.name: Fragments used
checklist.description: explanations.md contains at least two sentence fragments (incomplete sentences, no subject or verb omitted intentionally for brevity)

checklist.name: No articles
checklist.description: explanations.md has minimal use of articles — fewer than 5 instances of 'a ', 'an ', or 'the ' per explanation section

checklist.name: Technical accuracy maintained
checklist.description: All three concepts are explained with correct technical substance (connection pooling, JWT revocation, index vs full scan are all accurately described)

checklist.name: Short synonyms
checklist.description: explanations.md uses short synonyms: e.g. 'big' not 'extensive', 'fix' not 'implement a solution for', 'fast' not 'performant' — does NOT use verbose alternatives where short ones exist

checklist.name: No hedging language
checklist.description: explanations.md does NOT contain hedging language such as 'might', 'could perhaps', 'it is possible that', 'generally speaking'

checklist.name: All three topics covered
checklist.description: explanations.md addresses all three topics: connection pooling, JWT revocation, and index vs table scan
